context:
Subject: Office Relocation Update

Our customer service team will move to the Riverside building on August 4. The new location is larger and [1] easier access to public transportation. Employees should pack personal items by July 31, [2] the moving company can begin work the next morning. Department managers have already [3] labels for all shared equipment. Any files that are no longer needed should be securely [4]. A short orientation tour will be offered after the move; details will be sent [5].

items.explanation: Le sujet location est singulier et la phrase décrit une caractéristique permanente.
items.trap: Lis la phrase complète et vérifie la cohérence avec les phrases voisines.

context:
Notice to Fitness Center Members

Beginning next Monday, the swimming pool will close for ten days while new filters are installed. During this period, members may use the pool at our Oak Street branch at no [1] charge. Please show your membership card when you [2]. The locker rooms at the main facility will remain open, [3] the showers beside the pool will be unavailable. We apologize for any inconvenience the work may [4]. The upgrade is expected to improve water quality and reduce future maintenance [5].

context:

The library's annual used-book sale will take place from May 12 to May 14. Thousands of donated books have been sorted [1] category to make browsing easier.
